Become a Slyder

Become a Slyder

Join Jamaica's next delivery network and be part of the first wave powering a new era of logistics.

Flexible opportunity. Structured platform. Built for growth.

Apply NowRead Slyder FAQ

Founding network

Join early and prepare for launch in your area

SLYDE launches region by region, not all at once.
Early approved Slyders are best positioned as launch approaches.
After you apply, SLYDE sends a WhatsApp confirmation and email.
Approval leads to app access, setup, and readiness before work eligibility.

What Is A Slyder

A Slyder is an independent delivery partner on the SLYDE network

You choose when you work, where you operate, and how you prepare for launch using a platform designed for efficiency, safety, accountability, and long-term opportunity.

As SLYDE grows region by region, early Slyders will be among the first positioned in their area when operations begin.

Why Join Early

Joining early gives you an advantage

You are not just signing up for another delivery platform. You are becoming part of the founding SLYDE network in your area.

Founding network

Be part of the founding SLYDE network

Join early and become part of the first wave helping to build delivery strength in your area.

Launch position

Get positioned in your zone before launch

Early approved Slyders are best positioned as their area approaches launch readiness.

First-wave advantage

Prepare early for delivery opportunities

Learn the platform, complete onboarding, and stay ready as your area moves closer to going live.

Long-term growth

Grow with a company built for Jamaica and the Caribbean

SLYDE is designed to launch region by region with standards that support future Caribbean scale.

Early approved Slyders are best positioned as their zone approaches launch.

Digital payout support

Why digital payout support matters

Being a Slyder is more than completing deliveries. It is about operating efficiently, receiving earnings with confidence, and being prepared for more advanced job types as the network grows. SLYDE is building a payout experience that supports stronger earnings visibility, smoother withdrawal setup, and safer operational workflows. Supported digital payout rails, including Lynk-ready workflows, help position Slyders for a more modern way to work.

Less dependence on cash

Digital payout support helps reduce the pressure of cash-heavy operations and gives Slyders a cleaner way to manage earnings and payment activity.

Better payout visibility

Slyders should know when earnings are available, when payouts are pending, and how their payout method is configured.

Future-ready for funded errands

Some errands may require approved in-person payments. Structured payment support can help Slyders handle these tasks more safely and with better accountability.

Built for professional operations

From onboarding to readiness, SLYDE is designed to help Slyders work inside a more trusted and organized system.

As SLYDE expands, supported payout options may include bank-based methods, mobile-friendly methods, and approved digital rails such as Lynk where operationally available. Setup details and eligibility are handled during onboarding and platform review.

Who Can Apply

Multiple courier types can join the network

SLYDE is designed to support different delivery capacity types across Jamaica.

Bicycle riders

Well suited to short-distance urban movement as SLYDE builds out delivery density.

Motorcyclists

Strong fit for fast point-to-point coverage in early launch zones.

Car drivers

Useful for more flexible retail, pharmacy, and general delivery coverage.

Van and fleet support

Important for larger or more operationally demanding deliveries as the network grows.

When Can You Start Working

Your start time depends on your area's readiness

SLYDE launches by region, not all at once. We activate each area only when there are enough approved and ready Slyders to support reliable delivery operations.

That means your start time depends on your area's readiness, not just your application date. However, joining early puts you in the best position when your zone goes live.

1

Apply online

2

Get reviewed and approved

3

Receive access to the SLYDE app

4

Complete your setup and readiness steps

5

Begin working as your area launches

This approach helps SLYDE launch with stronger coverage, better reliability, and better support for both Slyders and businesses.

Your Area Matters

SLYDE tracks network strength by town and parish

Once your area reaches the required number of approved and ready Slyders, we move closer to launch in that zone. This helps us build a stronger, more dependable delivery network from day one.

We're building in your area

Your area is currently in the network-building phase. Joining now helps us build toward launch and puts you in position early.

Your area is building toward launch

We are actively onboarding Slyders in your area. As more approved and ready Slyders join, your zone moves closer to launch.

Your area is nearing launch readiness

Your area is approaching launch threshold. Early approved Slyders will be well positioned when deliveries begin.

Your area is launch-ready

Your area has reached readiness and is in final preparation. Complete your setup and stay ready for activation.

SLYDE is live in your area

Your area is now active. Eligible Slyders can begin receiving delivery opportunities through the SLYDE network.

How Onboarding Works

Clear steps from application to launch readiness

We've designed onboarding to be clear, structured, and easy to follow.

Workflow node 01

Apply online

Submit your details, documents, preferences, and readiness information through the website.

Workflow node 02

Confirmation sent

SLYDE confirms your application by WhatsApp and email so you know it was received.

Workflow node 03

Application review

The SLYDE team reviews your profile, documents, vehicle details, and area fit.

Workflow node 04

Approval and app access

If approved, you receive access to the SLYDE app and onboarding guidance.

Workflow node 05

Setup and readiness

Complete your setup, confirm readiness, and stay prepared as your area approaches launch.

Workflow node 06

Area launch and eligibility

You become best positioned to work when your zone is live and your readiness requirements are complete.

What Happens After You Apply

Real confirmation and structured follow-up

Once you submit your application, SLYDE will confirm that we received it.

A WhatsApp confirmation message
A confirmation email with your application details
Updates if our team needs more information
Follow-up guidance if you are approved for onboarding

We want every applicant to know their submission is real, received, and being handled through a structured review process.

Your confirmation message may also include area-specific launch information based on your town or parish.

Basic Requirements

Most applicants should be ready with the following

Requirements may vary depending on your vehicle type and area, but most applicants should be ready with these core items.

Valid identification

A government-issued ID is required to support identity review.

A working smartphone

You need a reliable smartphone for app access, tracking, and operational communication.

Reliable internet or mobile data access

You must be able to stay connected during onboarding and when your area launches.

WhatsApp access for updates

SLYDE uses WhatsApp and email to confirm applications and share onboarding updates.

Vehicle details and documents where required

Motorcycle, car, and van applicants must submit the necessary supporting records.

Availability for launch readiness

You should be ready to complete onboarding and deliver when your area goes live.

Future Opportunity

Approved Slyders will later be able to help grow their parish through Area Builder Rewards

SLYDE is preparing a future program where approved Slyders can help bring quality couriers into their area and unlock commission-free reward windows through the SLYDE app.

Learn about Area Builder Rewards

Setup reassurance

You do not need every setup detail before applying

The application process is focused on helping us understand your fit, availability, and readiness. Full payout setup guidance and supported payment options are introduced during onboarding.

Payment support

You do not need every setup detail before applying

The application process is focused on helping us understand your fit, availability, and readiness. Full payout setup guidance and supported payment options are introduced during onboarding.

Start your application

Join the SLYDE network today

Be part of the next generation of delivery in Jamaica. Apply early, secure your place in your area, and stay ready as SLYDE launches region by region.

Jamaica-First Logistics Infrastructure

SLYDE connects courier capacity, merchant fulfillment, and partner-ready logistics workflows.

Built for local operational credibility now, with standards that can support wider Caribbean scale later.
SLYDELogistics

SLYDE is a modern logistics network for Jamaica first, designed to support courier operations, merchant fulfillment, and future Caribbean partner integrations.
